com.pax.poslink.usb

Class UsbUtil

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.usb.UsbUtil

  • public class UsbUtil
extends java.lang.Object
    A convenient class for USB. Most of the time you do not need to use this.
    Only when you are sure that you need to request the USB permission yourself that you need this.
    Since version V1.01.04, some APIs are simplified. Please update.

    • Method Detail

      • hasPermission

        public static boolean hasPermission(Context context)
        Check whether the app has permission for the USB device.
        Returns:
        true if has permission.

      • hasPermission

        public static boolean hasPermission(Context context,
                                    UsbDevice usbDevice)
        Check whether the app has permission for the USB device.
        Returns:
        true if has permission.

        public static UsbDevice getDevice(Context context)
        The new getDevice need not vendorId and productId Get the USB device from Pax ICommUsbHost
        Returns:
        the UsbDevice.

      • requestPermission

        public static void requestPermission(Context context,
                                     UsbManager usbManager,
                                     UsbDevice usbDevice)
        Request USB permission from user.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        usbManager - android.hardware.usb.UsbManager
        usbDevice - android.hardware.usb.UsbDevice

      • registerPermissionGrantBroadcast

        public static void registerPermissionGrantBroadcast(Context context,
                                                    UsbUtil.UsbPermissionCallback permissionCallback)
        Register the BroadcastReceiver which receive the USB permission broadcast.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        permissionCallback - callback that calls when permission granted or denied.

      • registerAttachDeviceBroadcast

        public static void registerAttachDeviceBroadcast(Context context,
                                                 java.lang.Runnable attachDeviceCallback)
        Register a broadcast receiver to listen to Pax device attachment.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        attachDeviceCallback - Called when Pax USB Device is attached.

      • requestUSBPermissionIfNeed

        public static void requestUSBPermissionIfNeed(Context context)
        Convenient method to request PAX USB device permission. It registers the broadcast to inform whether the permission granted.
        Parameters:
        context - App context

      • requestUSBPermissionIfNeed

        public static void requestUSBPermissionIfNeed(Context context,
                                              UsbDevice usbDevice)
        Convenient method to request PAX USB device permission. It registers the broadcast to inform whether the permission granted.
        Parameters:
        context - App context
        usbDevice - android.hardware.usb.UsbDevice
